title: ICAI Releases Notification for Executive Officer Recruitment 2026: 108 Vacancies Announced!
content:
# ICAI Releases Notification for Executive Officer Recruitment 2026: 108 Vacancies Announced!

Ek important update hai. The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne Executive Officer recruitment ke liye notification announce kiya hai. This is a significant opportunity for eligible professionals to join the prestigious institution.

Here are the key details:

*   **Total Executive Officer Vacancies:** ICAI ne various disciplines mein 108 Executive Officer posts ke liye applications invite kiye hain. Iske अलावा, 1 Director (Legal) post bhi hai, making it a total of 109 vacancies.
*   **Notification Reference:** Yeh recruitment Advertisement No. 04/2026/HRD/03 ke under publish kiya gaya hai.
*   **Application Start Date:** Online application process April 01, 2026 se start ho gaya hai.
*   **Last Date to Apply:** Interested candidates April 15, 2026 tak online apply kar sakte hain.
*   **Eligibility and Application:** Detailed eligibility criteria, age limits, educational qualifications, pay scales, and the selection process ke liye official notification ko carefully read karna zaroori hai.

Candidates are advised to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=14605)

*Published on: 6 April 2026*
